name: IdsEdwDrgDLoad

text.value: WITH SourceData AS (SELECT DRG_SK, DRG_CD, DRG_METH_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, DRG_ARTHMTC_AVG_LOS, DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD, DRG_DIAG_CAT_NM, DRG_DESC, DRG_GEOMTRC_AVG_LOS, DRG_METH_NM, DRG_TYP_CD, DRG_TYP_NM, DRG_WT_FCTR, DRG_WT_FCTR_TX, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD_SK, DRG_METH_CD_SK, DRG_TYP_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.drgd_TMP_IdsEdwDrgDLoad) UPDATE T SET T.DRG_CD = S.DRG_CD, T.DRG_METH_CD = S.DRG_METH_CD, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, T.DRG_ARTHMTC_AVG_LOS = S.DRG_ARTHMTC_AVG_LOS, T.DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD = S.DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD, T.DRG_DIAG_CAT_NM = S.DRG_DIAG_CAT_NM, T.DRG_DESC = S.DRG_DESC, T.DRG_GEOMTRC_AVG_LOS = S.DRG_GEOMTRC_AVG_LOS, T.DRG_METH_NM = S.DRG_METH_NM, T.DRG_TYP_CD = S.DRG_TYP_CD, T.DRG_TYP_NM = S.DRG_TYP_NM, T.DRG_WT_FCTR = S.DRG_WT_FCTR, T.DRG_WT_FCTR_TX = S.DRG_WT_FCTR_TX, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD_SK = S.DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD_SK, T.DRG_METH_CD_SK = S.DRG_METH_CD_SK, T.DRG_TYP_CD_SK = S.DRG_TYP_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.DRG_D T JOIN SourceData S ON T.DRG_SK = S.DRG_SK INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.DRG_D (DRG_SK, DRG_CD, DRG_METH_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, DRG_ARTHMTC_AVG_LOS, DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD, DRG_DIAG_CAT_NM, DRG_DESC, DRG_GEOMTRC_AVG_LOS, DRG_METH_NM, DRG_TYP_CD, DRG_TYP_NM, DRG_WT_FCTR, DRG_WT_FCTR_TX, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD_SK, DRG_METH_CD_SK, DRG_TYP_CD_SK) SELECT S.DRG_SK, S.DRG_CD, S.DRG_METH_CD, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.DRG_ARTHMTC_AVG_LOS, S.DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD, S.DRG_DIAG_CAT_NM, S.DRG_DESC, S.DRG_GEOMTRC_AVG_LOS, S.DRG_METH_NM, S.DRG_TYP_CD, S.DRG_TYP_NM, S.DRG_WT_FCTR, S.DRG_WT_FCTR_TX, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.DRG_DIAG_CAT_CD_SK, S.DRG_METH_CD_SK, S.DRG_TYP_CD_SK FROM SourceData S LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.DRG_D T ON T.DRG_SK = S.DRG_SK WHERE T.DRG_SK IS NULL

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2006 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


DESCRIPTION:    Pulls data from ids DRG table and edw DRG Dimension table
      
                          
PROCESSING:
                  IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes
                  EDW - Read from source and dump to hf. Do nothing but trim the fields.
                  /dev/null - no records, just used to re-init the IUD hf
  

OUTPUTS: 
                    Each of the stream output hash files

MODIFICATIONS:
              Tom Harrocks 08/02/2004-   Originally Programmed
              O. Nielsen       04-14-2005 -    Changed DB2 stages from user defined to Generated.
              Brent leland     03/24/2006    Changed parameters to evironment variables.
                                                             Took out trim() on SK values.
                                                             Combined DRG_F column into DRG_D and dropped DRG_F table.
              Brent Leland    05/11/2006    Removed trim() on codes and IDs

2007-101-17     SAndrew                  eproject #3492         DRG conversion of DRG CMS to DRG MS.                                                                         devlEDWcur            Steph Goddard     10/25/2007
                                                                                          changed drg_d record adding drg_mthd_cd, drg_mth_cd_sk field    
                                                                                          Added new cdma lookup in for cd and name for trgt_domain =  "DIAGNOSIS RELATED GROUP METHOD CODE"




Rajasekhar Mangalampally       09/24/2013     5114                Original Programming                                                                                          EnterpriseWrhsDevl          Jag Yelavarthi          2013-12-22
